Bus Timings

Abu Dhabi 420 Bus Timetable - LifeCare Hospital to Shakhbout City

September 8, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Abu Dhabi’s public transportation system continues to offer convenient and affordable travel options for residents and visitors. The 420 Bus route is a crucial link between LifeCare Hospital and Shakhbout City, providing passengers with access to key residential, commercial, and healthcare locations. This article provides a comprehensive overview of the Bus 420 route, its key stops, timetable, accessibility services, and tips for an optimized journey.

Operational Details

Bus 420 operates regularly throughout the day, providing passengers with frequent and reliable service. The bus departs from both LifeCare Hospital and Shakhbout City, ensuring easy access to various key locations along the route. Below are the key timings for Bus 420:

From LifeCare Hospital From Shakhbout City
05:46 06:17
06:45 07:17
07:45 08:17
08:45 09:17
09:46 10:17
10:46 11:17
11:46 12:17
12:46 13:17
13:43 14:18
14:43 15:17
15:47 16:17
16:47 17:17
17:46 18:17
18:46 19:17
19:46 20:17
20:46 21:17
21:46 22:17
22:46 23:17

Bus 420 Timetable

For the full schedule, passengers can visit the official Abu Dhabi Department of Transport website or follow this link for the detailed Bus 420 Timings.

Ticket Pricing: Payments for Bus 420 are made via the Hafilat Card, Abu Dhabi’s convenient cashless payment system. The fare for travel within one zone is AED 2, with an additional charge of AED 0.05 per kilometer. Hafilat cards can be easily topped up online or at various kiosks located throughout the city, offering a seamless, cash-free experience for all passengers.

Bus Route Overview

The Abu Dhabi Bus 420 operates between LifeCare Hospital and Shakhbout City, ADNOC. Along its route, the bus serves several important stops, making it an essential mode of transportation for residents, students, and commuters. Below is a detailed list of stops along the 420 Bus route:

  1. LifeCare Hospital - The starting point, offering healthcare services.

  2. Al Oshoush Village - A residential area providing local access.

  3. Magenta Pearl Village 2 - Another residential hub.

  4. Al Asqa’ Street - A key road connecting various neighborhoods.

  5. Baniyas Court - An important public space for the community.

  6. Maryam Bint Omran School - Serving local educational needs.

  7. Souq - A marketplace offering various goods and services.

  8. Taxi Station - A convenient location for taxi services.

  9. Baniyas Cooperative Society - A shopping destination for daily necessities.

  10. Suhaila Rashid Al Rumaithi Mosque - A spiritual landmark in the area.

  11. Hamza Bin Abdulmotalab Secondary School - An educational institution for secondary students.

  12. Municipal Market - A hub for local vendors and shoppers.

  13. Salama Bint Butti School - Catering to the educational needs of the community.

  14. Street 14 - A local access road.

  15. Public Emergency & Safety Department - A key service point for public safety.

  16. Bawabat Al Sharq Mall South - A popular shopping destination.

  17. Bawabat Al Sharq Mall North - Another access point for shoppers.

  18. Street 13 - A connecting road for local traffic.

  19. Abu Dhabi Islamic Bank - Providing financial services to the community.

  20. ADNOC - A stop for refueling and essential services.

  21. Souq - Another stop at the marketplace for convenient access.

  22. Street 60 - A major thoroughfare.

  23. Al ‘Azeeziyyah Street - A residential street providing access to local amenities.

  24. Rabie Al Qubaisi Mosque - A spiritual landmark for residents.

  25. Mafraq Dental Center - A healthcare service provider.

  26. Mafraq Hospital - A key medical facility.

  27. New Al Mafraq Hospital Main Entrance - The main entry point to a modern healthcare facility.

  28. Al Falah Street - A local road connecting residential areas.

  29. Al Ruwad Street - A residential street.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Al Jawhar Street - Another street for local access.

  2. Street 21 - A connecting road for local neighborhoods.

  3. Al Hasimeen Street - A residential area with local amenities.

  4. Theyab Bin Eissa Street - Another access road in the area.

  5. Al Tamayyuz Street - A local street for residential access.

  6. Al Mal Street - Connecting various neighborhoods.

  7. ADNOC - A stop for fuel and convenience.

  8. Al Tarheeb Street - Another access point.

  9. American International School - Serving the educational needs of international students.

  10. Al ‘Umlat Street - A local road.

  11. Al Watan School - Catering to local students.

  12. Al Mutakayyif Street - A residential street.

  13. Al Turoush Street - Providing local access.

  14. Stop 15072 - A designated bus stop.

  15. Al Tafdeel Street - Another local access road.

  16. Stop 15076 - A designated bus stop.

  17. Shakhbout City, ADNOC - The final destination, providing access to fuel and shopping.

Accessibility and Services

The Bus 420 is designed to be inclusive, ensuring that all passengers can travel comfortably. Here are some key accessibility features:

  • Ramps for wheelchair access: Passengers with mobility impairments can easily board and disembark.

  • Designated seating for those with mobility issues: Reserved seating ensures comfort for passengers with special needs.
  • Audio-visual aids: The bus is equipped with announcements and visual displays to assist passengers with hearing or vision impairments.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

Throughout the journey, passengers on Bus 420 can access various attractions and landmarks that offer unique experiences:

  1. Bawabat Al Sharq Mall A key shopping destination with a wide range of retail outlets, restaurants, and entertainment options.

  2. Mafraq Hospital One of Abu Dhabi’s largest healthcare facilities, serving a wide range of medical needs.

  3. Maryam Bint Omran School A notable educational institution for the local community.

  4. Abu Dhabi Islamic Bank A major financial institution offering various banking services along the route.

Whether you’re shopping, attending school, or seeking medical care, the Bus 420 provides a reliable way to access these important locations.

Journey Experience

The route winds through quiet residential areas and schools, showcasing the rapid development of Shakhbout City.

Along the way, passengers can catch glimpses of the city’s ongoing infrastructure projects, reflecting its steady growth. The combination of essential stops and evolving landscapes makes Bus 420 a valuable transport option for everyday travel.

Travel Tips for Bus 420

  • Plan Ahead: Review the bus timings to avoid delays, especially during peak hours.

  • Use the Hafilat Smart Card: This convenient cashless payment option is available on all Abu Dhabi buses.
  • Monitor Bus Updates: Use the Abu Dhabi Mobility app to stay updated on real-time bus schedules.
  • Avoid Peak Times: If you prefer a quieter ride, avoid the morning and evening rush hours.

With its comprehensive list of stops, regular service, and convenient schedules, Bus 420 guarantees a smooth and cost-effective journey for all passengers.

Whether you’re on your way to the hospital, attending school, or shopping, the 420 Bus offers an essential link across Abu Dhabi. For more information, don’t forget to explore the complete bus routes available in Abu Dhabi!

  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)
